payload.title: Site Development Regulations (dimensional standards by district)
payload.subsectionPath: Title 25 > Ch 25-2 Zoning > Subch C > Art 2 > Div 2
payload.bodyText: Establishes the site development regulations table that fixes, per zoning district, the minimum lot size, maximum floor-to-area ratio, maximum building coverage, maximum impervious cover, and minimum yard setbacks. For MF-3 the table sets maximum FAR 0.75:1, maximum building coverage 50 percent, maximum impervious cover 60 percent, front street yard 25 feet, interior side yard 5 feet, street side yard 15 feet, and rear yard 10 feet. §25-2-562 references this table for the MF-3 dimensional standards.

provenance.corpus: Austin LDC code corpus (Municode productId 15303 'Land Development Code')
provenance.produced: MF-3 site development dimensional standards (FAR, coverage, impervious, setbacks)
provenance.citation: Austin Land Development Code §25-2-491 (site development regulations).

reasoning: Supporting code-section atom that supplies the MF-3 FAR / coverage / impervious / setback values the zoning atom cites. The MF district regulation §25-2-562 references this dimensional table; both were retrieved from the Austin LDC corpus rather than hand-asserted, which is the substrate differentiator the ground-truth doc calls for.

confidence.stateNote: Dimensional standards sourced from the Austin LDC corpus with a publisher deep-link. Not earned-calibrated.
